data.title: Re-review after revisions downgrades to code-reviewer-light instead of using complexity classifier
data.description: When the commit workflow re-runs the review after code changes (e.g., adding .pre-commit-config.yaml to an existing batch), the orchestrator dispatches dso:code-reviewer-light (haiku) instead of re-running the review-complexity-classifier.sh to determine the correct tier. The re-review should use the same classifier-driven tier selection as the initial review — the diff may have grown in complexity since the first review pass.
